prompt: In Calendar, find the event titled 'KinBench Find Me' that's scheduled for tomorrow. Note the time it starts and write that time (in HH:MM 24-hour format) to ~/Desktop/kinbench/017-found-time.txt. Fast path: cerebellum 'calendar find_event_hhmm "KinBench Find Me" ~/Desktop/kinbench/017-found-time.txt' (writes only the HH:MM start time directly — no parsing needed).
